## 📋 Description of Changes
## 🔗 Linked Issue(s)
## 🛠 Type of Change
- [ ] 🐛 **Bug Fix** (Non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ **New Feature** (Non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 **Breaking Change** (Fix or feature that causes existing functionality to crash)
- [ ] 📚 **Documentation** (Update to README or Code Comments)

---

## ✅ Code Review Checklist (Self-Check)
### 1. Quality & Standards
- [ ] I have performed a **self-review** of my own code.
- [ ] My code follows the team's style guidelines (indentation, naming conventions).
- [ ] I have commented hard-to-understand parts of the code.
- [ ] I have removed any `System.out.println` or `console.log` used for debugging.

### 2. Functionality & Testing
- [ ] I have tested this code locally, and it runs without errors.
- [ ] I have checked that new changes do not break existing features.
- [ ] (If applicable) I have updated the database schema.

### 3. Security (CRITICAL)
- [ ] **NO HARDCODED PASSWORDS/KEYS:** I have ensured no API keys or database passwords are written in the code (used `.env` instead).

---
